jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Haldiram's
jsonLd.description:
Haldiram's is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haldiram's:
Haldiram's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's!
